progress_summary: v1.4 SHIPPED — pack registry GA in PR #222 (ADEV-331): 11 languages, 11+ frameworks, 4 mobile platforms, 4 hosting deploy-targets, /coverage page, v1.4 pill on homepage, 5 skills bumped 1.2.0 → 1.4.0. Post-v1.4 also live on main: #213 (homepage redesign + grouped header + ⌘K palette), #228 (nav icons + dot-fill + desktop type bump), #223 (/changelog roadmap timeline + feature-request form), #231 (changelog leak fix). TODAY (2026-05-13): PR #224 merged (squash 344e591) — two roadmap docs lock in v1.5/v1.6/v1.7. roadmap/07 picks v1.5 = AI-native, v1.6 = instrumentation, v1.7 = lean marketplace; roadmap/08 sequences v1.5 into 5 sprints (~84 Claude / 10 user hours, 6-week cadence). Linear ADEV-344 (parent v1.5 AI-native) + ADEV-345/346/348/349 (Sprints 1–4) created this session. Sprint 5 (v1.5 launch + promote) ticket still TBD. Production runs v1.4 GA — manual deploy of any post-v1.4 UI changes is the only thing standing between users and the new nav/changelog. No blockers.

key_decisions: v1.4 SHIPPED as coverage-as-a-plugin-registry. 18 skills (release-ops included). 11 langs / 11+ frameworks / 4 mobile / 4 hosting. 5 skills version-bumped 1.2.0 → 1.4.0.

v1.5 = AI-native. 4 new skills (claude-api / rag-forge / agent-forge / prompt-ops) → 22 total. 6-week cadence, 5 sprints, ~84 Claude / 10 user hours. Sprint 1 starts with checkpoint-protocol v1.3 schema bump + SKILL.md frontmatter scaffolds.

v1.5 cross-skill ripples (Sprint 3): stack-forge gains vector-DB packs (pgvector / Turbopuffer / Pinecone / Supabase Vectors); code-auditor learns prompt-injection + tool-use safety rules; app-architect /discover gains an 'AI app?' branch.
v1.5 GTM bundle (Sprint 4): /blog scaffold + first 2 posts, newsletter flag wired (Buttondown), /for-agencies page + agency demo scenario. This is the distribution arc that has been open since v1.0.
v1.6 = instrumented pipeline (cost-ops + telemetry-ops, eval scores from bug-check + code-auditor, checkpoint-protocol v1.3 adds cost + eval_scores + telemetry_handle, public /dashboard).
v1.7 = pick ONE distribution play, lean version: marketplace + template-ops. Decision deferred to v1.6 retro based on actual pull from v1.5/v1.6.

Deploy stays manual via `wrangler login` from laptop. GitHub Actions Cloudflare token cannot manage opchain.dev zone (error 100117) — `.github/workflows/deploy.yml` + `promote.yml` were removed. CI verifies build green; humans push to prod.
PostHog is the runtime flag backend; registry default is fail-closed when PostHog is unconfigured/unreachable. Server-only flags never leak to the browser (PUBLIC_FLAG_NAMES allowlist).
user_preferences: Pulls scope INTO releases when it expands the value prop; comfortable with bigger releases when PR sequence is clear.
Asks sharp clarifying questions about user-visible mechanics before approving.
Wants Linear kept current with the actual plan — re-aligns tickets when scope shifts.
Approves merges promptly once CI is green; deploys are always manual.
Strict on scope — do NOT extend work beyond what's explicitly asked. Prior overreach in this session: creating ADEV-349 unprompted. Don't repeat.

next_actions: Reconcile the remaining stale checkpoints to match post-v1.4 reality. Specifically: git-ops (says 'caught up through #189', actually #231), stack-forge (says v1.4 PR 4 ready to commit, actually PRs 4–8 all shipped), app-architect (still claims v1.3 shipped, needs v1.4 GA flip), code-auditor + ux-engineer (no audit/UX review for the v1.4 → post-v1.4 surfaces yet). Each is one `npm run checkpoint -- update <skill> --phase=... --step=... --progress_summary=...` invocation.
Draft the missing Linear Sprint 5 child under ADEV-344 (v1.5 launch + promote) so the v1.5 ticket tree is complete before Sprint 1 kicks off. Only when explicitly asked.

Kick off v1.5 Sprint 1 (ADEV-345): bump checkpoint-protocol schema (verify scope — roadmap/07 has the schema additions slated for v1.6; check if v1.5 just adds the `pm_refs` field per the existing checkpoint-protocol v1.2 spec) and scaffold SKILL.md frontmatter for claude-api / rag-forge / agent-forge / prompt-ops per roadmap/07's outlines.

Manual deploy of post-v1.4 surfaces if not already live: `npm run deploy:staging` → eyeball staging.opchain.dev → `npm run deploy`. Sanity-check via `curl -sS https://staging.opchain.dev/api/health` — `version` field should match local commit SHA.

VERIFY Linear ticket IDs: the prior orchestrator state (2026-05-12) listed ADEV-344/345/346/347 as a11y cleanup children under ADEV-338, shipped via #196/#197. The IDs I used this session (ADEV-344 v1.5 parent + 345/346/348/349 sprints) may collide — confirm via Linear before relying on them.
